name: usd_swaption_sabr_cube
description: Synthetic USD swaption SABR cube calibration output flattened at selected expiry-tenor buckets.

provenance.source_detail: Deterministic synthetic swaption-vol calibration fixture with flattened SABR outputs
provenance.regen_command: manual formula fixture; flattened outputs committed in fixture

source_validation.reason: Fixture contains final curves, smiles, hazards, or SABR parameters but lacks quotes/source instruments required to run product calibration engines and compute RMSE.
source_validation.required_for_execution: Add market quotes/source instruments and wire the runner to the real calibration engine so RMSE is computed from calibration residuals.
